
## Invited talks

-   **Inference on local variable importance measures for heterogeneous treatment effects**\
    [CAUSALab Methods Series](https://nyheter.ki.se/kalender/inference-on-local-variable-importance-measures-for-heterogeneous-treatment-effects), Stockholm, February 2026
    
-   **Inference on local variable importance measures for heterogeneous treatment effects**\
    [UW Biostatistics Seminar](https://www.biostat.washington.edu/news/seminar), Online, February 2026 

-   **Causal inference methods to optimize clinical decision-making in treatment initiation based on routinely collected data**\
    [SMARTbiomed Seminar](https://smartbiomed.dk/news-and-events), Online, January 2026 
    
-   **Inference on local variable importance measures for heterogeneous treatment effects**\
    [CFE-CMStatistics](https://www.cmstatistics.org/CFECMStatistics2025/), London, December 2025 

-   **Inference on local variable importance measures for heterogeneous treatment effects**\
    [Joint Statistical Meetings](https://ww2.amstat.org/meetings/jsm/2025/), Nashville, August 2025 
    
-   **Inference on local variable importance measures for heterogeneous treatment effects**\
    [Nordic-Baltic Biometric Conference](https://www.nbbc2025.com/), Oslo, June 2025 

-   **Orthogonal learners for prediction under hypothetical interventions, with application in acute kidney injury**\
    [International Biometric Conference](https://members.biometricsociety.org/ibc2024/home), Atlanta, December 2024 

-   **Inference on variable importance measures for heterogeneous treatment effects**\
    [Conference on Statistical Learning and Data Science](https://sites.google.com/view/slds2024/menu), Newport Beach, November 2024
    
-   **Causal inference methods to optimize clinical decision-making in treatment initiation based on routinely collected data**\
    [Biostatistics Seminar at the University of Copenhagen](https://biostatistics.dk/seminars/previous.html), Online, October 2024 

-   **Causal inference methods to optimize clinical decision-making in treatment initiation based on routinely collected data**\
    [Research Seminar at IDEAS NCBR](https://ideas-ncbr.pl/en/), Warsaw, September 2024

-   **Sequential counterfactual prediction to support individualized decisions on treatment initiation**\
    [Lorentz Center Workshop "Counterfactual Prediction for Personalized Healthcare"](https://www.lorentzcenter.nl/counterfactual-prediction-for-personalized-healthcare.html), Leiden, December 2022 

-   **Does it matter when we start RRT in AKI? The views of a data scientist**\
    27^th^ Belgian Dialysis Symposium, Hasselt, April 2022
